title: G-40
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Youmay|the droids|the [[G-40 portable cannon]] or the [[G-40 sniper rifle]]}}
'''G-40s''' were large, silver-[[Color/Legends|colored]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]] used to complete menial tasks. A group of G-40s were tasked with loading subjects into indoctrination booths aboard the ''[[Eye of Palpatine]]''.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
